summary: Added a committed pre-push hook for release provenance. The hook refuses dirty pushes, runs verify-build-provenance --require-clean, then runs make build-provenance. Release docs now explain hook installation and the remaining Xcode Archive preflight requirement. The pre-existing Xcode build-number bump to 20260513172951 was committed first so the new hook can pass from a clean committed release state.
validations_passed: dirty-tree negative check: touch .owlory-pre-push-dirty-test; .githooks/pre-push refused push; remove file

contract_status_changes.before: Release provenance validation existed as explicit commands, but there was no committed Git hook refusal point before push.
contract_status_changes.after: A committed .githooks/pre-push hook blocks dirty or unreproducible release metadata before push when core.hooksPath is installed.

residual_risks: Git hooks are local and must be installed per checkout with git config core.hooksPath .githooks.
The pre-push hook cannot stop Xcode Organizer from archiving; the release preflight remains required immediately before archive.
This slice does not retry or claim TestFlight proof.
recommended_next_reason: Now that the build-number bump is committed and the push-time provenance hook is installed, retry TestFlight proof only if the installed TestFlight Build Info matches the committed build and source.
